data.title: Two-factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced security through two-factor authentication for user accounts.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect against unauthorized access.

data.title: Spam and Abuse Filters
data.description: Automated systems detect and reduce spam, fake engagement metrics, and abuse.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection mechanisms against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: A dedicated team monitors and responds to security threats.
